textAnnotations.description:
DESERT LUNA & AGAVE Premium Botanical Spirit,
crafted from blue Weber agave and a delicate blend of
high-altitude desert botanicals. Distilled over fire with
hand-harvested wild lavender and sun-dried lemon.
DESERT LUNA & AGAVE Premium Botanical Spirit.
Distilled from [updated thɛte list of new botanicals].
BATCH N° 04, formula: 'DL-8812-24',
serialNumber: 'TTB-S-98765432',
ABV: 40% ALC./VOL. NET CONTENTS: 750ml.
(iupdated text.
GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon
General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages
during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects.
(2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your
ability to drive a car or operate machinery, problems.
INGREDIENT LIST: DESERT AGAVE PIÑAS,
WILD LAVENDER, DRIED LEMON PEEL,
CORIANDER SEEDS, ANGELICA ROOT.
uniqueSellingPoints:
['SINGLE-ORIGIN AGAVE']
'WILD-HARVESTED LAVENDER']
'COPPER POT DISTILLED*]
N/A
